assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope but sets exclusion period from Nov 15 to Dec 5 (20 days), which is within 30-day limit, but doesn't explicitly mention the 30-day maximum constraint or that this blocks patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Correctly uses 'ALL_UPGRADES' scope for the June code freeze exclusion from June 1-30

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Does not use 'no_minor' or 'no_minor_or_node' scopes for permanent minor version control. Instead disables auto_upgrade on node pools, which is a different approach. Does not mention --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum constraint for 'no upgrades' exclusions or the up-to-EoS capability for 'no minor or node upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Provides gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope='ALL_UPGRADES' flags for both exclusion periods

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48-hour maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Provides manual upgrade scripts but does not explicitly mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows or that only auto-upgrades respect them

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Includes a note to 'Monitor for security patches during exclusion periods' which addresses the risk of falling behind on versions
